examples: He grinds ax on the grindstone.
This power-propelled grindstone type we had at St. Xavier's.
Good day, gentlemen; and until that day comes, keep your ear to the grindstone.
From November elected Police and Crime Commissioners are expected to keep police noses to that grindstone.
This would have been an odd decision anywhere but it was revolutionary in nose-to-the-grindstone Korea.
